frictions.description: `werk add` human output is not ID-only, so direct shell capture failed for follow-up commands.
frictions.resolution: Switched to `werk --json add` and parsed `id` from JSON.

frictions.resolution: Allowed commands to continue and complete; no functional impact on assertions.
